infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app needs always-on location to track your daily movement, location entropy, and home time ratio for mental health monitoring.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs location access to track your movement and places visited.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: This app needs background location to track your daily displacement and location patterns.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: This app uses motion sensors to count your steps and measure physical activity.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: This app reads contact count to estimate your social connection metrics.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow MH Monitor to use your location in the background for movement tracking.

plugins.contactsPermission: Allow MH Monitor to read your contacts list to estimate social connectivity.
